subcodes.first_line: O beloved aunt! Render thanks unto God that thou hast journeyed from the north of grief to the realm of joy, and from the darkness of error [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خاله حمد کن خدا را که از شمال حزن بیمین سرور راجع شدی و ظلمت ضلالت را
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @spiritual transformation, @pain of love; love as veil, @consolation and comfort
